articles.headline: Anthropic Seeks Guidance from Christian Leaders on AI Ethics and Morality
articles.description:
Anthropic, the company behind the AI chatbot Claude and a massive battle with the War Department playing out in the court system, recently consulted with a group of Christian religious leaders for advice on developing ethical AI systems.

articles.headline: Artificial general intelligence and the future of surgery

articles.headline: How 10-year-old Tilly Smith helped save dozens of lives on Thailand beach during 2004 tsunami
articles.description: Officials credit 10-year-old English girl Tilly Smith with helping to save about 100 lives just before the Indian Ocean tsunami of 2004 struck the island of Phuket in Thailand.

articles.headline: Lessons learned in 70s have made US, world economies less vulnerable to oil shocks
articles.description: The world economy is experiencing a significant oil price surge reminiscent of the 1970s. However, countries are now better prepared. Decades of efforts have increased energy efficiency and reduced reliance on Middle Eastern oil. New energy sources and stockp…
